calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Continued To Aug-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Bourne-Vanneck appeared via zoom for Jing Zhao (petitioner).

Counsel requested more time to file the accounting petition. The matter is continued to August 17, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Arthur Liu Pursuant to CCP 177.5 payable within 10 days of the order.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Continued To Jun-15-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Arthur Liu to appear on Jun-15-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An Order to Show Cause as to why the Executor should not be suspended shall be set for Jun-15-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To May-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Arthur Liu for executor Jing Zhao (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Liu reported that issues had arisen regarding certain assets, including inconsistencies between the will and beneficiary designations on accounts, and that some funds had already been distributed to designated beneficiaries. He stated that the administrator is working to address those issues and anticipated filing a petition within approximately 30 days.

The matter was continued to May 18, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Continued To Nov-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Arthur Lou appeared in person for Jing Zhao (executor).

Mr. Lou apologizes to the Court, and that it was a calendaring error on his part. The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Arthur Lou payable within 10 days of the order.

Discussion was held regarding the sale of the condo, that his client is traveling right now, that he's trying to reconcile with the beneficiaries regarding the jewelry, and that he will be filing his final accounting after his client returns.

The matter is continued to November 19, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Continued To Jul-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Arthur J. Liu to appear on Jul-21-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why neither a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have been filed. Additionally, an Order to Show Cause will be issued to Attorney Arthur J. Liu to appear on Jul-21-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear.

The status hearing is continued to the above date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Continued To Jun-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Arthur Liu for Jing Zhao, Executor (via Zoom).

Mr. Liu reported that the property, designated as low-income housing, is subject to restrictions by the City and County of San Francisco, requiring additional steps to complete the sale. However, progress is being made and he expects to close the sale in January 2025. Mr. Liu estimated needing 2-3 months for the property sale and preparation of filing a petition for final distribution.

The court continued the status hearing to June 9, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Dec-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Arthur Liu appeared by zoom for Jing Zhao.

Mr. Liu stated that he did not receive notice of the June 10th hearing and that he was not aware of the hearing. The court does not find good cause for the non-appearance and orders sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Mr. Liu payable within 10 days. Mr. Liu stated that his client is not the heir, that the siblings are, that the property got approval from the housing authority and that he expects it will be four to six for the sale of the property. The court informed Mr. Liu that he needs to file a petition pursuant to Probate Code 12200, and read codes 12200 and 12201. Status on close of estate is continued to December 23, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed one week prior to the hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Continued To Jul-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney Arthur J. Liu to appear on July 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear, and for failure to file a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is also continued to July 8, 2024.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone/Santos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Continued To Jun-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Attorney Arthur Lee checked in with the clerk prior to commencement of the calendar being called and advised her that he had another matter to attend. When the matter was first called, Mr. Lee was not present on zoom. The matter was passed and re-called at the end of the calendar, but Mr. Lee still was not signed on. Status on close of estate is continued to June 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Continued To May-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Arthur Liu appeared via zoom for Jing Zhao (executor).

Mr. Liu stated that probate referee is still working on the appraisal of the real property and would like a 60-day continuance. Compliance hearing on filing petition is continued to May 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Continued To Mar-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 27, 2021 is admitted to probate. Jing Zhao is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate is set for December 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
